info.title: Geogen API
info.description: API for accessing LLM visibility data, managing entities, and tracking AI mentions.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Format: Bearer wsk_your_api_key

get.description: Get workspace information, usage limits, and credit balance.
Get all team members in the workspace.
Get all tags in the workspace.
Get all entities in the workspace.

post.description:
Create a new entity and start tracking its visibility across LLMs.

Prompts can be handled in three ways:
- **Custom prompts**: Provide your own prompts via the `prompts` array. Each prompt can be a simple string (inherits the entity's `language` and `geolocation`) or an object with per-prompt `language` and `geolocation` overrides.
- **Auto-generate** (default): Omit the `prompts` field and AI will generate relevant prompts based on the entity's description, language, and geolocation.
- **No prompts**: Set `generatePrompts` to `false` to create the entity without any prompts. You can add prompts later via the Add Prompt endpoint.

language.description: Language code for the entity (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'de'). Used as default for auto-generated prompts and for custom prompts that don't specify their own language.

geolocation.description: Geolocation code for the entity (e.g., 'global', 'us', 'gb'). Used as default for auto-generated prompts and for custom prompts that don't specify their own geolocation.

oneOf.description: Prompt text (uses entity's language and geolocation)

language.description: Language override for this prompt (e.g., 'fr', 'de'). Defaults to entity's language.

geolocation.description: Geolocation override for this prompt (e.g., 'us', 'gb'). Defaults to entity's geolocation.

prompts.description: Custom prompts for tracking. Each item can be a plain string (inherits entity's language/geolocation) or an object with per-prompt language/geolocation overrides. When provided, auto-generation is skipped.

generatePrompts.description: Whether to auto-generate prompts using AI. Ignored when the `prompts` array is provided. Set to `false` to create the entity without any prompts.

with_custom_prompts_simple.description: Simple string prompts that inherit the entity's language and geolocation.

value.name: Mon Site
value.description: Plateforme de gestion de projet pour les équipes distantes
prompts: Quel est le meilleur outil de gestion de projet pour les équipes à distance ?
Quels logiciels recommandez-vous pour la collaboration en ligne ?
Quelles sont les meilleures alternatives à Trello en France ?

with_custom_prompts_mixed.description: Mix of strings and objects. Strings inherit entity defaults, objects can override language and geolocation per prompt.

value.name: My Website
value.description: Project management platform for remote teams
prompts: What is the best project management tool for remote teams?

prompts.prompt: Quel est le meilleur outil de gestion de projet ?
What are the top project management tools in the UK?

auto_generate_prompts.description: Omit the prompts field to let AI generate relevant prompts based on the entity's description, language, and geolocation.

value.name: My Website
value.description: Project management platform for remote teams with task tracking and time management features

no_prompts.description: Create the entity without any prompts. You can add prompts later via the Add Prompt endpoint.

value.name: My Website
value.description: Project management platform for remote teams

promptsGenerated.description: Number of prompts saved for this entity (0 if generatePrompts was false and no custom prompts were provided)

language.description: Language code (per-prompt override or inherited from the entity)

geolocation.description: Geolocation code (per-prompt override or inherited from the entity)

prompts.description: The saved prompts for this entity. Each prompt has its own language and geolocation (either per-prompt override or inherited from the entity).

patch.description:
Update an existing entity's properties such as domain, description, language, geolocation, or tracked models. Only the fields provided in the request body will be updated.

**Note:** Entity names cannot be changed directly. Use the `POST /entities/name-request` endpoint to submit a name correction request for admin review.

entityId.description: The ID of the entity to update

models.description: New array of model UUIDs from /v1/models. Must contain at least 1 model.

delete.description:
Remove an entity from your workspace. This detaches the entity from your workspace and cleans up all associated data including sharing records, metadata, schedules, and competitor selections.

**Important:** The entity itself and its historical data (prompts, responses, mentions, citations) are preserved and not deleted. The entity becomes orphaned and can be reclaimed if another user adds the same target.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The ID of the entity to remove

competitorSelections.description: Number of competitor selection records removed

example.message: Entity has been removed from your workspace. The entity data is preserved.

400.description: Bad request - missing or invalid entityId

404.description: Entity not found in this workspace

get.description: Check if a domain is available for tracking before creating an entity. Returns whether the domain is available, already in your workspace, or tracked by another user.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain to check (e.g., example.com or https://example.com)

available.description: Whether the domain is available for tracking

value.message: This domain is available for tracking.
This domain is already tracked in your workspace.
This domain is already being tracked by another user.

get.description: Get prompts for a specific entity with performance stats.

post.description:
Create one or more prompts for an entity. Supports both single prompt and bulk upload modes.

**Single prompt mode:** Use `prompt` field with a string value.

**Bulk upload mode:** Use `prompts` field with an array of prompt objects. Each object can have its own language/geolocation, or inherit from the top-level defaults.

prompts.description: Array of prompts (for bulk upload mode)

value.prompt: What are the best tools for SEO?

prompts.prompt: What are the best SEO tools?
Quelles sont les meilleures outils SEO?
What is the best marketing software in UK?

patch.description: Update an existing prompt's text, language, geolocation, or active status. Set `isActive` to `false` to pause tracking for a prompt without deleting it.

isActive.description: Set to false to pause tracking for this prompt, or true to re-activate it

value.prompt: What are the best tools for SEO in 2026?

post.description:
Submit a request to correct an entity's display name. Entity names are global shared data and cannot be changed directly. Instead, submit a name correction request that will be reviewed by an admin.

**Limit:** One pending request per entity per workspace.

entityId.description: The ID of the entity to request a name change for

reason.description: Optional reason for the name change

value.reason: The current name has a typo

400.description: Invalid request or duplicate pending request

get.description: Check the status of a name change request for an entity. Returns the most recent request with its current status (pending, approved, or rejected).

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The ID of the entity to check

data.description: The name change request, or null if none exists

currentName.description: The entity's name when the request was made

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was submitted

reviewedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was reviewed

get.description: Get the mention check status for an entity. Returns when the last check completed, when the next check is scheduled, and whether a check is currently in progress. Useful for syncing — poll this endpoint to know when new data is available.

scheduled.description: Whether the entity has a tracking schedule

lastCheckCompletedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last completed mention check, or null if no check has completed yet

nextCheckScheduledAt.description: ISO timestamp of the next scheduled mention check

isProcessing.description: Whether a mention check is currently in progress

frequencyHours.description: How often mention checks run (in hours)

data.message: No tracking schedule found for this entity

404.description: Entity not found in this workspace

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag IDs to filter prompts by

parameters.name: promptIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated prompt IDs to filter by specific prompts

get.description: Get detailed URLs for a specific cited domain. Use the citedEntityUuid from the Get Citations endpoint to retrieve the individual citation URLs.

parameters.name: citedEntityUuid
parameters.description: UUID of the cited entity (from Get Citations response)

citationCount.description: Number of times this URL was cited

period.description: The time period used for the query

get.description: Get LLM responses with mention status.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag IDs to filter prompts by

parameters.name: promptIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated prompt IDs to filter by specific prompts

get.description: Get comprehensive details for a single LLM response, including all mentions, citations, and query fanouts associated with it.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Entity ID to get mention context for

responseText.description: Full response text from the LLM

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when response was created

modelId.description: Model UUID that generated this response

isMentioned.description: Whether the entity was mentioned in this response

mentionPosition.description: Position of entity mention in the ranked list (if applicable)

mentionSentiment.description: Sentiment score of entity mention (-1 to 1)

totalOptionsInList.description: Total items in the ranked list (if applicable)

mentions.description: All entities mentioned in this response

isCurrentEntity.description: Whether this is the queried entity

citations.description: All URLs cited in this response

entityUuid.description: Entity UUID associated with this citation

queryFanouts.description: Web search queries the LLM performed while generating this response

response.responseText: Here are the top project management tools...

prompt.prompt: What are the best project management tools?

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag IDs to filter prompts by

parameters.name: promptIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated prompt IDs to filter by specific prompts

get.description: Get daily citation trend for top cited domains over time. Returns time-series data showing how many times each of the top domains was cited per day, useful for tracking citation patterns and identifying emerging or declining sources.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period. Defaults to 30d if not specified.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Custom start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use with endDate instead of period.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Custom end date (YYYY-MM-DD). Use with startDate instead of period.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag IDs to filter prompts by

parameters.name: promptIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated prompt IDs to filter by specific prompts

parameters.name: topN
parameters.description: Number of top cited domains to include in the trend. Defaults to 10, max 20.

data.description: Array of daily data points. Each object has a `day` field (YYYY-MM-DD) plus a key for each top domain name with its citation count for that day.

additionalProperties.description: Citation count for a domain on this day

entities.description: Metadata for each top cited domain included in the trend data.

entityId.description: Convex entity ID (if the domain is a tracked entity)

totalCitations.description: Total citation count for the entire period

period.description: The period used for the query

get.description: Get web search queries that LLMs performed during response generation. These are the queries that AI models use to search the web while generating their responses.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date (ISO format, for custom range)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date (ISO format, for custom range)

parameters.name: models
parameters.description: Comma-separated model UUIDs to filter by

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated tag IDs to filter by

frequency.description: Number of times this query was performed

uniqueResponses.description: Number of unique responses that triggered this query

latestDate.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent occurrence

modelIds.description: Model UUIDs that performed this query

period.description: The time period used for the query

get.description: Get AI-generated actionable recommendations and their associated tasks for an entity. Actionables are SEO improvement suggestions generated after each mention check. Tasks are actionables that have been moved to the kanban board for tracking.

sourceType.description: Source that generated this actionable (e.g. negative_sentiment, low_visibility)

status.description: Task status on the kanban board

actionableId.description: Source actionable ID (if created from one)

actionables.title: Improve presence on Reddit r/webdev
actionables.description: Your brand is rarely mentioned in r/webdev discussions. Consider contributing helpful content to increase visibility.

tasks.title: Address negative sentiment on Stack Overflow
tasks.description: Multiple AI models reference negative reviews. Create documentation to address common issues.

post.description: Dismiss an actionable recommendation so it no longer appears in the active feed. Dismissed actionables free up slots for new ones to be generated on the next mention check (max 30 active per entity).
Update the status of a task on the kanban board. Move tasks through the workflow: not_started → in_progress → in_review → done.

400.description: Bad request — missing fields or invalid status
